name: sunside-iphone-selfie
prompt: iphone front camera selfie of {prompt}, casual phone photo, natural indoor light, slight lens distortion, realistic skin texture, candid, unedited social media photo
negative_prompt: studio lighting, softbox, cinematic, dslr, bokeh, shallow depth of field, airbrushed, glamour, plastic skin, 8k, hdr, professional photoshoot

name: sunside-amateur-candid
prompt: candid amateur photo of {prompt}, shot on a phone, imperfect framing, natural look, raw photo, everyday moment
negative_prompt: studio, professional photography, cinematic, polished, perfect composition, airbrushed, cgi, render

name: sunside-mirror-selfie
prompt: mirror selfie phone photo of {prompt}, front-facing camera, bathroom or apartment interior, soft window light, casual pose, realistic phone capture
negative_prompt: studio backdrop, cinematic lighting, fashion editorial, airbrushed, plastic skin, perfect makeup photoshoot

name: sunside-expressive-face
prompt: expressive face of {prompt}, clear facial emotion, natural microexpressions, realistic eyes and mouth, authentic reaction, not a blank stare
negative_prompt: blank expression, dead eyes, frozen face, plastic smile, warped mouth, broken teeth, asymmetrical eyes, airbrushed face, doll face
